title: HF-IQR V2 Pre-registration Amendment

deviations.reason: llama3-70b was accessible via local NGROK infrastructure but API integration with the council run protocol was not completed before data collection began. Decision made to proceed with 5 frontier API models rather than delay the study.
deviations.impact: Findings are limited to the five frontier models that completed all five rounds. llama3-70b comparisons are not possible from this dataset.

deviations.reason: Inter-rater correlation r=0.238 to r=0.470 between local jury models indicated insufficient reliability for primary endpoint reporting.
deviations.impact: ESVR is reported as a methodological finding not a primary metric. IQS composite score adjusted accordingly.

deviations.actual: PS and CR reported as independent metrics
deviations.reason: Peer review identified circular dependency in combining correctness with deliberation stability. RQR proxy using correctness reduces component independence.
deviations.impact: Position Stability and Correctness Rate reported separately. Relationship between them is itself a finding.

status: AMENDMENT FILED — data collection already complete at time of filing
